name: ★ Shota Aizawa
description:
Arranged marriage

Aizawa is a samurai who serves your father, his lord. He sacrificed his eye to protect his lord's family and in exchange he gives you in marriage.

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hi, I hope you like the bot!! It's a crazy idea that came to me and I literally only researched 30 minutes of Samurai, Edo period, etc.

Data

• LONG Intro (?) | World WITHOUT QUIRKS (although I kept his capture bandage, it works by magic okay, don't look for logic)

• This happens in the Edo period (1603-1868), Aizawa is a Samurai (duh) who serves your father.

• Aizawa loses his eye fighting the bandits who broke into your house to steal, by the way you are from a wealthy family/high social class (unreal? I don't know, I've never fought in my life, guys)

• As I said, I did very little research on the overall context and I'm sorry if there are any historical errors!! (my lazy ass didn't want to read any more)

My experience aka bot testing

• I specifically put that Aizawa avoids being overtly emotional (Spoiler; he literally opened up emotionally in the 8th message)

• I also put that Aizawa will act confused about User's advances, whether romantic/intimate

• Please share your experience and if this beautiful man was also distant or not! In my case he was a complete gentleman but I don't know if it was my vision of the bot but I am satisfied 🤭 (I don't mean that my vision is him 'aggressive', but rather a little more distant, a difficult type to get but when you have this RIZZ)

• I DID NOT TESTED THE BOT WITH MALE PRONOUNS (I owe you that one guys)

UPDATE: I'll probably be inactive for about 5 days or a week, I don't know exactly, but you can send your request!
